content.en:
It's hard!

As soon as Ye Tian began to perfect the Silver Purple Emperor Technique, he felt the amazing difficulty, and it was estimated that it would take a long time to perfect the Silver Purple Emperor Technique.

"It's too difficult!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He estimated that there were other assessments between the Black Iron Battle Body Technique and the Silver Purple Emperor Technique, but the stone tablet was broken, resulting in some mutilated assessments.

No matter what this didn't affect, Ye Tian quickly straightened his mind and continued to refine the Silver Purple Emperor Technique.

Year after year passed.

Years!

100,000 years!

Millions of years!

Finally, on this day of the 1.86 million year, Ye Tian perfected the Silver Purple Emperor Technique.

And the perfected Silver Purple Emperor Technique is not weaker than the Xuanxuan Secret True Spirit Chapter, and he can also cultivate both, which is enough to make the physical body stronger.

Therefore, the Silver Purple Emperor Technique was still useful to Ye Tian, but it was not too useful.

What Ye Tian cared about was not the Silver Purple Emperor Technique, but the subsequent assessment, if he continued to assess, the remnants of the Chaos Body Alchemy Technique that appeared would inevitably surpass the Xuanxuan Technique.

Keep up the assessment!

Ye Tian came to the fourth layer of the assessment space.

At this time, Ye Tian was surprised to find that he had approached the broken stone stele, and this was already the last level of assessment.

"There are only four layers of assessment space, it seems that this stone tablet is too damaged, otherwise there should be more assessment space!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Entering the fourth layer of space, Ye Tian naturally also obtained a fragmented version of the Chaos Alchemy Technique-Golden Ape Alchemy!

"This alchemy...... It's too complicated, isn't it?"

Ye Tian was extremely shocked.

He originally thought that this Chaos Body Alchemy Technique was only a little stronger than the Xuan Xuan Jue, but he never expected that this Chaos Body Alchemy Technique seemed to be much stronger than the Xuan Xuan Jue, it was not a grade, but at least two grades worse!

It was shocking that a Heavenly Ape Sect with only a True Ancestor would possess such a body refining technique.

However, Ye Tian frowned and said secretly: "This Golden Ape Alchemy Technique is so high-end, if you want to perfect it, it is estimated that it will be very difficult!"

If it takes billions of years to perfect this Chaos Alchemy Technique, it seems that it is a bit more than worth the loss.

But he didn't want to give up, if he gave up perfecting, if he left here, the content of the Golden Ape Alchemy would be quickly forgotten.

"It must be perfected, even if it wastes more time, it must also be perfected this Chaos Alchemy Technique, otherwise, if I want to reach the ultimate of the physical body at the True Monarch level, it is estimated that it will be very troublesome. The mere Mystery Void Secret True Spirit Chapter can't allow me to reach the limit of my physical body at all, and I can only reach one-tenth of it, so I have to cultivate a stronger Chaos Alchemy Technique or use massive resources to accumulate physical strength!"

Ye Tian said in a low voice.

So, Ye Tian decided to perfect the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique.

As soon as he perfected it, Ye Tian was shocked to find that his aura seemed to be endless, and the speed of perfection was too fast.

"It's this ruined stone tablet!"

Ye Tian understood.

At this moment, under the influence of the Broken Stone Tablet, he was able to perfect the Chaos Alchemy Technique faster.

This is estimated to be a benefit given by the Heavenly Ape Sect, otherwise those True Monarch disciples are estimated to be unable to perfect the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique in their lifetime, and the purpose of the assessment will be gone.

"Originally, if you relied on yourself, it would take at least billions of years to perfect the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, but now it is estimated that it only takes 10 million years to completely perfect this Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, and it is perfectly perfect!"

Ye Tian calculated.

Time passed slowly –

Because of the appearance of the ruins of the Heavenly Ape Sect, many True Monarchs have grown extremely fast, and even more than ten True Monarchs have broken the shackles in one fell swoop with the help of the opportunity or inheritance of the ruins, completely condensed a complete avenue, and stepped into the half-step True Ancestor realm.

And some True Monarchs have also entered the True Monarch List one after another, Ye Tian, who was originally on the True Monarch List, has been participating in the cultivation and perfecting the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, which has caused his cultivation to stop temporarily, so he suddenly fell out of the True Monarch List.

Ye Tian didn't care about this, if he wanted to re-enter the True Monarch List, it would definitely be easy.

And no one among the other True Monarchs dared to underestimate Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian's growth rate was so fast, who would dare to underestimate him?

Moreover, the fact that Ye Tian had been destroying the stone tablet to perfect the Chaos Alchemy Technique also spread quickly, so people were very clear about the reason why his strength was not improving.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's loud laughter filled the assessment space on the fourth floor of the broken stone stele, but no one heard it.

"It's finally perfect!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

After perfecting, the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique was simply a chaotic alchemy technique against the sky, far surpassing the Xuanxuan Technique, and there were more shadows of the forbidden Chaos Alchemy Technique.

According to Ye Tian's guess, the forbidden Chaos Alchemy Technique was probably earth-shattering, but it was a pity that the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique was already the highest level of Chaos Alchemy here.

Of course, Ye Tian was also very satisfied.

Immediately.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique here, and as for the Xuanxuan Jue True Spirit Chapter, he gave it up.

The Golden Ape Alchemy is divided into six realms, and each realm is divided into four levels: entry, small success, great completion, and consummation.

The first realm is suitable for the level below the Heavenly Monarch, the second realm is suitable for the Heavenly Monarch, the third to fourth realms are suitable for the True Monarch, and the fifth and sixth realms are suitable for the True Ancestor.

In short, the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique could be cultivated all the way to the True Ancestor Extreme.

From this point, it can be seen that the Golden Ape Alchemy is a chaotic alchemy technique of immeasurable value.

Not long after cultivating, Ye Tian found that the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique was too suitable for him, even more suitable for him than the Xuanxuan Technique.

"It's strange, I've been cultivating the Xuanxuan Technique since I was weak, why do I feel that the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique is perfect for me since I started cultivating?" Ye Tian was curious.

But soon, he understood.

Because the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique was perfected by him, to a certain extent, it was the Chaos Alchemy Technique that was perfected and created according to his own situation, so it was the most suitable for him, and the Xuanxuan Technique was created by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, not specially created for him.

Therefore, the Golden Ape Alchemy is more suitable for him.

Ye Tian somewhat understood why the Heavenly Ape Sect had allowed people to enter the stone tablet space to continuously improve the Chaos Alchemy Technique, and he was afraid that the Chaos Alchemy Technique that had been perfected in this way was the most suitable for him.

Everyone cultivates the Chaos Alchemy Technique that suits them, and their own potential can be developed.

"This Heavenly Ape Sect is not simple!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left here and entered the Time True Tower.

This time, he was ready to use the 10,000 times time acceleration of the Time True Tower to improve his strength with all his might.
